race.comment: With the early favourte coming out, LAUBERHORN (12) goes on top. He was well backed to win on debut at Sale before an even effort last start at Pakenham. He's open to a stack of improvement and should get every hope from the draw. RODRIQUEZ (7) ran on well first up over 1000m to grab third at Caulfield Heath. Tough draw here but up to 1200m should suit now and he can figure. ELECTRIC TOMMY (1) resumes having been racing well last time in, tackling a few races with subsequent stakes form out of them. He's won a jumpout, respecting. OLIVIA ROSE (13) has been thereabouts in two runs back and won't need to improve a whole lot to be figuring prominently.
